questions.question: Which CSS Grid setup creates responsive product columns?
questions.explanation: auto-fill with minmax creates responsive columns that adapt to available space.

questions.question: How do you create a slide-out cart drawer?
questions.explanation: Fixed position with translateX and transition creates smooth slide-out drawers.

questions.question: Which ARIA attribute indicates a cart item count changed?
questions.explanation: aria-live='polite' announces content changes to screen readers without interrupting.

questions.question: What is the purpose of accent-color in CSS?
questions.explanation: accent-color styles native form controls like checkboxes and radio buttons.

questions.question: How do you make a filter sidebar sticky?
questions.explanation: position: sticky with a top value keeps the sidebar visible during scroll.

questions.question: What HTML attribute makes product images lazy load?
questions.explanation: loading='lazy' defers loading off-screen images until they are near the viewport.

questions.question: Which CSS property creates a badge overlay on images?
options: position: absolute on the badge with relative parent
questions.explanation: Absolute positioning on a badge with a relative parent positions it over the image.

questions.question: How do you center content in a flex container?
questions.explanation: Flexbox with both justify-content and align-items centered creates perfect centering.

questions.question: What does aspect-ratio: 1 do?
questions.explanation: aspect-ratio: 1 maintains a 1:1 width-to-height ratio, creating a square.

questions.question: How do you show a discount percentage badge?
questions.explanation: An HTML element (badge) with absolute positioning over the product image is the standard approach.

questions.question: What CSS property creates the hover effect on product cards?
questions.explanation: A slight lift with transform and enhanced box-shadow on hover creates visual feedback for product cards.

questions.question: How do you create product star ratings with CSS?
options: Unicode stars with color and flexbox
questions.explanation: Unicode star characters (★) with CSS color and flexbox layout create lightweight star ratings.

questions.question: What is the best layout approach for a checkout form?
questions.explanation: Single-column checkout forms have the highest completion rates as users scan vertically.

questions.question: How do you style a breadcrumb navigation?
options: Flexbox row with separators using ::before or ::after
questions.explanation: Flexbox with pseudo-element separators (e.g., content: '/') is the cleanest breadcrumb approach.

questions.question: What CSS approach creates a responsive product grid that adjusts columns automatically?
questions.explanation: auto-fill with a minmax value creates fluid columns that adjust count based on available container width.

questions.question: How do you create a quantity selector UI?
questions.explanation: A flexbox row with decrement button, number display, and increment button is the standard quantity selector pattern.

questions.question: What ARIA role is appropriate for a product card?
questions.explanation: role='article' on product cards indicates each card is a self-contained composition.

questions.question: How do you create a sticky add-to-cart bar on mobile?
questions.explanation: A fixed-position bar at the bottom of the viewport ensures the add-to-cart button is always accessible on mobile.

questions.question: What CSS property creates the image overlay on hover for product cards?
options: opacity transition on an overlay element
questions.explanation: An absolutely positioned overlay with opacity transition creates a smooth hover reveal effect.

questions.question: How should an empty cart state be styled?
options: Centered message with icon and CTA button
questions.explanation: An empty cart should show a centered, friendly message with an icon and a clear call-to-action to continue shopping.
